# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-external-db-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - "third-party-api.com"
    - "external-db.com"
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-api-external-db-virtual-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - "third-party-api.com"
    - "external-db.com"
  http:
  - match:
      uri:
        prefix: "/"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: third-party-api.com
        port:
          number: 80
    - destination:
        host: external-db.com
        port:
          number: 5432

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: microservices-external-access-service-entry
spec:
  hosts:
    - "microservice-1.internal"
  ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: microservices-external-access-virtual-service
spec:
  hosts:
    - "microservice-1.internal"
  http:
  - match:
      uri:
        prefix: "/"
    route:
    - destination:
        host: third-party-api.com
        port:
          number: 80
